Index.intro_monkey_4: Ukwenzela oko, ndifuna ukhangele idilesi apho kwenzeke khona kwibha engentla.
Index.address_next_step: Ngoku cofa iqhosha lasekhaya ezantsi kwam.
Index.inicio_next_step: |Sixelele ngoku ukuba uyilahlile na okanye uyifumene kwaye ugcwalise ifomu.
Index.select_found_location_error: Kufuneka ukhethe indawo apho ufumene khona isilwanyana-qabane kwibar yokukhangela ngasentla.
Index.select_lost_location_error: 41||Kufuneka ukhethe indawo apho ulahlekelwe sisilo-qabane kwibar yokukhangela engentla.
Index.must_upload_photo: Kufuneka ulayishe ubuncinci ifoto enye phambi kokuba uyigcine.
Index.name_max_length_error: Igama lesilo-qabane kufuneka libe nobuninzi {max} amagama.
Index.save_success_found: Enkosi ngokubhalisa isilo-qabane esifunyenweyo. Sizakuqhagamshelana nawe nge-imeyile oyisebenzise xa ungena.
Index.save_success_lost: Siyaxolisa ngesilo-qabane sakho esilahlekileyo. Ukuba kukho umntu oyifumanayo, bayakuqhagamshelwana nabo nge-imeyile oyisebenzise xa ungena.

WarningWizard.site_only_computer: 58||Kufuneka ndikuxelele ukuba le ndawo ibonakala kuphela kwikhompyuter.
